frontmatter.title: Exploring How Systems Work
frontmatter.description: A college-days deep dive into how big systems actually work under the hood: I built a small compiler, a SQLite-like database, and explored multithreading, just to understand the internals.
frontmatter.bannercaption: Building small versions of big systems to see how they really work
